violations.description: REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids.( lids are up )
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some dry-storage shelving noted not in good repair.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mop noted in sink not hung to air dry.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): One ceiling tile noted missing in kitchen / prep area needs install. Light covers in kitchen need cleaning. Fanguards inside walkin cooler need cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Pop gun drains behind bar noted in need of cleaning. Small oscillating fan in kitchen needs cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): White cutting board noted not in good repair. Bev Air reachin cooler noted with water on interior bottom needs repair and cleaned out. (condensing water)
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Cell phone noted on stainless steel counter in prep area; observed not properly stored.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some shelving in dry-storage noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Pop gun drains behind bar noted in need of routine cleaning. Top of large pizza oven needs routine cleaning.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): A few ceiling tiles near hood vent in prep area noted browned-stained need cleaning or replaced. Two ceiling tiles moved (prep and dry-storage areas) need install. Ceiling vent covers in both restrooms need cleaning.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
